'''ân-s-l-z''' ('''kanaslezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tumultuate|tumultuate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tumultuate|tumultuate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-s-l-z
|-
! Lemma
| kanaslezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinaslezoko|thinaslezoko]] || [[word:jinaslezoko|jinaslezoko]] || [[word:shinaslezoko|shinaslezoko]] || [[word:kinaslezoko|kinaslezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|}
